bits.premise: Biblical body-part ratios are extended to hands, making constant finger-blasting a divine commandment.
An empowering anti-faking-orgasm declaration is undercut by indifference rather than skill.
Medical advice about urinating after sex is reframed as an invitation for a golden shower fetish.
A claim of making eye contact during sex is true only because it is directed at one's own reflection, reframed as cuckold fantasy.
